/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-base/compiz/src=/usr/src/debug/compiz -flto=auto -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/decoration.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libdecoration.so.0 -o libdecoration.so.0.0.0 CMakeFiles/decoration.dir/decoration.c.o  -lXrender -lX11 -lm
